zh: 新增现代 Lexora 文字标，并统一应用首页、设置页与官网品牌展示。
修复检查更新时提示文字没有精确居中的问题。
官网首屏加入动态 Lexora 文字标，并优化导航与移动端视觉层级。
新增严格模糊搜索：完全匹配失败时自动校验相似词，并用红黄标记清楚说明结果。
官网新增本地设备识别与对应平台下载推荐，不会上传设备信息。
en: Introduced a modern Lexora wordmark across the app home, Settings, and official website.
Added an animated hero wordmark and refined website navigation and mobile hierarchy.
Added strict fuzzy lookup with validated similar matches and clear red/yellow result markers.
Added private on-device platform detection and recommended downloads on the website.
